scenes.voice: Hey kids, today we're going to talk about something very cool - leadership and teamwork! Imagine you're playing your favorite sport, and you and your friends need to work together to win. What does it take to be a great leader and a great team player?

scenes.subtext: Good communication is important for teamwork.
scenes.voice: Good communication is like a superpower for teams. When you talk clearly and listen carefully, you can work together more easily and make better decisions. Can you think of a time when good communication helped you and your friends?

Did you know that there are different ways to be a leader? Some leaders are very outgoing and make big decisions, while others are more quiet and listen carefully before acting. What kind of leader do you think you would be?

scenes.subtext: Conflicts can arise, but we can resolve them.
scenes.voice: Conflicts can happen when team members disagree or don't see eye-to-eye. But the good news is that we can resolve conflicts by listening to each other and finding a solution that works for everyone. Can you think of a time when you resolved a conflict with a friend?

scenes.subtext: Everyone has a role to play in a team.
scenes.voice: When we work in a team, each member has a special role to play. Some team members might be good at scoring goals, while others are great at passing the ball. What role do you think you would be good at in a team?

scenes.subtext: Is the statement true or false?
scenes.voice: Here's a question for you: Good communication is only important in big teams. Is the statement true or false?

So, what did we learn today? Remember, good communication is key to teamwork. Being a good leader means knowing your leadership style and being able to resolve conflicts. And everyone has a role to play in a team. Great job, team! You're now leaders and team players!
